name: Xero
shortDescription: A comprehensive integration with Xero accounting software that enables automated financial workflows. This extension provides full access to contacts, invoices, payments, bank transactions, credit notes, quotes, purchase orders, items, accounts, and financial reports, with real-time and polling triggers for event-driven automation.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Creates a new contact (customer or supplier) in Xero. Contacts are used for invoicing, bills, and tracking business relationships.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Updates an existing contact's information in Xero.

actions.name: Get Contact
actions.description: Retrieves a single contact by ID with full details including addresses and phone numbers.

actions.name: Find Contacts
actions.description: Searches for contacts with optional filters. Supports pagination for large result sets.

actions.name: Archive Contact
actions.description: Archives a contact, making it inactive but preserving historical data.

actions.name: Create Invoice
actions.description: Creates a new invoice (sales invoice or bill) in Xero. Supports line items, tax, and multi-currency.

actions.name: Update Invoice
actions.description: Updates an existing invoice. Only DRAFT invoices can have line items modified.

actions.name: Get Invoice
actions.description: Retrieves a single invoice by ID with full details including line items and payments.

actions.name: Find Invoices
actions.description: Searches for invoices with optional filters by contact, status, type, and date range.

actions.name: Void Invoice
actions.description: Voids an invoice, making it inactive while preserving the record.

actions.name: Email Invoice
actions.description: Sends an invoice to the contact via email directly from Xero.

actions.name: Create Payment
actions.description: Records a payment against an invoice or bill in Xero.

actions.name: Get Payment
actions.description: Retrieves a single payment by ID with full details.

actions.name: Find Payments
actions.description: Searches for payments with optional filters by invoice or reference.

actions.name: Delete Payment
actions.description: Deletes a payment from Xero. Only non-reconciled payments can be deleted.

actions.name: Create Bank Transaction
actions.description: Creates a spend or receive money transaction in Xero.

actions.name: Get Bank Transaction
actions.description: Retrieves a single bank transaction by ID with full details.

actions.name: Find Bank Transactions
actions.description: Searches for bank transactions with optional filters by type, reference, invoice, or date range.

actions.name: Create Credit Note
actions.description: Creates a credit note to refund or credit a customer/supplier.

actions.name: Get Credit Note
actions.description: Retrieves a single credit note by ID.

actions.name: Allocate Credit Note
actions.description: Allocates a credit note to an invoice to reduce the amount due.

actions.name: Create Quote
actions.description: Creates a new quote/estimate for a customer.

actions.name: Get Quote
actions.description: Retrieves a single quote by ID.

actions.name: Find Quotes
actions.description: Searches for quotes with optional filters.

actions.name: Create Purchase Order
actions.description: Creates a new purchase order for a supplier.

actions.name: Get Purchase Order
actions.description: Retrieves a single purchase order by ID.

actions.name: Create Item
actions.description: Creates a new product or service item in Xero.

actions.name: Get Item
actions.description: Retrieves a single item by ID or code.

actions.name: Find Items
actions.description: Lists all items in Xero with optional search filter.

actions.name: Get Accounts
actions.description: Retrieves the chart of accounts with optional type filter.

actions.name: Get Balance Sheet
actions.description: Retrieves the balance sheet report showing assets, liabilities, and equity.

actions.name: Get Profit and Loss
actions.description: Retrieves the profit and loss (income statement) report.

actions.name: Get Trial Balance
actions.description: Retrieves the trial balance report showing all account balances.

actions.name: Get Aged Receivables
actions.description: Retrieves aged receivables report showing outstanding customer invoices.

actions.name: Get Aged Payables
actions.description: Retrieves aged payables report showing outstanding supplier bills.

actions.name: Get Organization
actions.description: Retrieves details about the connected Xero organization.

actions.name: Get Currencies
actions.description: Retrieves all currencies enabled for the organization.

actions.name: Get Tax Rates
actions.description: Retrieves all tax rates available in the organization.

idealUseCases: Automating invoice creation and payment tracking for recurring billing workflows
Building AI agents that sync customer data between CRM systems and Xero
Creating automated payment reminders and collection workflows based on aging reports
Implementing real-time notifications when invoices are paid or overdue
Developing expense tracking automation with bank transaction categorization
Setting up automated quote-to-invoice conversion workflows
Building supplier payment automation with purchase order management
Automating financial reporting and dashboard updates
Creating customer onboarding workflows that provision contacts and payment terms
Implementing multi-currency transaction processing for international businesses
